[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up image shows a white background with large black text in two columns and an orange thinking-face emoji near the right side.  

Main Subject:  
The visual focus is on the displayed text, with an emoji placed to the right of the second column of words.  

Setting:  
The scene appears to be a simple graphic or screenshot-like layout on a plain white background, with no visible outdoor or indoor environment.  

Visual Details:  
The image uses high-contrast black lettering in a bold, rounded font style. The text is arranged in two vertical groupings: the left side reads across multiple lines, while the right side contains shorter lines stacked beneath “KO.” The emoji is a small orange face with a thinking expression, positioned toward the lower right area. The camera view is straight-on and tightly cropped, focusing only on the text and emoji.

The image displays two-column black text on a white background alongside a thinking-face emoji. It appears to be a cropped text graphic or messaging-style screenshot.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
